name: Deploy to Netlify Now
description: Manually trigger: commit all pending changes and push to GitHub, which triggers GitHub Actions to build and deploy to Netlify (ana-pulse.netlify.app).

then.prompt:
The user wants to deploy InsightPulse to Netlify right now. Execute these steps using execute_pwsh:

1. git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" add -A
2. Check if there are staged changes with: git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" diff --cached --quiet
3. If there are changes (non-zero exit), commit: git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" commit -m "deploy: manual trigger from Kiro IDE"
4. Push: git -C "C:\Users\prade\OneDrive\Desktop\InsightPulse\sentiment-ai-platform" push origin main
5. After successful push, tell the user:
   'Deployed! GitHub Actions is building and pushing to Netlify.
   Monitor CI/CD: https://github.com/P-V2705/INSIGHTPULSE/actions
   Live in ~90 seconds: https://ana-pulse.netlify.app
   Netlify deploy log: https://app.netlify.com/sites/ana-pulse/deploys'
